'' : {bad.st}}} /> {open.bad ? : } {bad.fc && } {network_code === "F" ? <> setOpen({ ...open, ftth: !open.ftth })}> ຂໍ້ມູນ FTTH {ftth.st === '' ? '' : bl.st === 'loading' ? {bl.st} : bl.st ? : No}} /> } setOpen({ ...open, call: !open.call })}> ຂໍ້ມູນເບີໂທ {call.st === '' ?
